heading: Our Service Offerings
intro: Taxation, accounting, secretarial, management, auditing, hardware wholesale, technical services, and training — all under one roof since 1981.

items.title: Taxation & Accounting
items.desc: Bookkeeping, financial statements, tax filing, SST & e-Invoice compliance, and LHDN liaison.

items.title: Secretarial & Management
items.desc: Company incorporation, SSM annual filings, board resolutions, and corporate compliance.

items.title: Auditing
items.desc: Independent financial audits for stakeholders, banks, and regulatory bodies.

items.title: Business Solutions Advisory
items.desc: Strategic advisory, process consulting, and tailored solutions to streamline SME operations.

items.title: Computer Hardware & Technical
items.desc: Hardware wholesale, IT infrastructure, networking, and on-site SME support across Pahang.

items.title: Server & Infrastructure
items.desc: Server setup, deployment, configuration, and ongoing maintenance for SME infrastructure.

items.title: Software Training & Support
items.desc: Authorized AutoCount & FeedMe dealer — installation, licensing, training, and support.

items.title: Webinar & Workshops
items.desc: Live webinars and on-demand training on accounting, tax, and business software.
